Notes: Most widely accepted English test for global university admissions and immigration (UK, Canada, Australia). IDP is the sole administrator in India.

Exam Name: TOEFL iBT (Test of English as a Foreign Language)
Notes: Highly preferred by US and Canadian universities. Measures academic English proficiency.
Fully computer-based English test with rapid result delivery; widely accepted in Australia, UK, and Canada.
An adaptive, at-home English proficiency test accepted by thousands of universities worldwide, especially in the US.
English proficiency test tailored specifically for healthcare professionals (doctors, nurses) seeking to work abroad.
Standardized test for undergraduate college admissions, primarily in the United States. Now conducted fully digitally.
Alternative to the SAT for US undergrad admissions. Includes a dedicated Science reasoning section.
Allows high school students to earn US college credits and stand out in the undergrad admission process.
Standardized test for admission to global graduate programs (Master's, Ph.D.), especially in STEM and humanities.
The premier standardized test for admission to top global MBA and business master's programs.
Required for admission to Juris Doctor (JD) programs in the US, Canada, and Australia. (Distinct from LSAT-India).
Mandatory admissions test for medical and dental degree programs in the UK, Australia, and New Zealand.
Three-step examination required for medical licensure in the United States. Step 1 and 2 CK can be taken in India.
Mandatory for international medical graduates wishing to practice medicine in the United Kingdom. PLAB 1 is held in India.
Licensing examination required to practice as a Registered Nurse (RN) in the US and Canada. Can now be taken in Indian test centers.
Official certification for Japanese language proficiency (Levels N5 to N1). Crucial for study or work in Japan.
Official diplomas awarded by the French Ministry of Education to certify French language proficiency.
Official German language proficiency exams (A1 to C2). Mandatory for German student and work visas.
Official test for Korean language proficiency. Widely required by Korean universities and employers.

Conducting Body: Center for Language Education and Cooperation
Notes: Official standardized test for Standard Chinese language proficiency for non-native speakers.

Exam Name: DELE (Diplomas de Espańol como Lengua Extranjera)
